---
editor: 
  markdown: 
    wrap: 72
---

title: "Title of the report" subtitle: "Subtitle" date: last-modified \#
display the date of the last edit author: - name: "Author 1" orcid:
1234-1234-1234-12345 affiliation: "University of Zurich" format: html:
toc: true \# add a table of contents engine: jupyter
